Localization.Description: A user created a link to a password

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} created a link to a password from private vault "{datafield3}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} created a link to a password from organization vault "{datafield3}" on host {event_src.host}
